title: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have...
title_en: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have...
title_uk: А тепер стає ще цікавіше! Російські tg-канали мають...
description: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have already suggested that the Research Institute of Marine Thermal Engineering - a key enterprise for the creation of underwater weapons - will arrive in St. Petersburg. Among other things, there they are engaged in the development of torpedo weapons and power plants for underwater weapons of the Navy.
description_en: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have already suggested that the Research Institute of Marine Thermal Engineering - a key enterprise for the creation of underwater weapons - will arrive in St. Petersburg. Among other things, there they are engaged in the development of torpedo weapons and power plants for underwater weapons of the Navy.
description_uk: А тепер становится еще интереснее! Российские тг-каналы уже предположили, что в Петербурге мого прилететь в НИИ Морской теплотехники - ключевое предприятие по созданию подводного оружия 👍 Среди прочего там занимаются разработкой торпедного вооружения и энергетических установок для подводного оружия ВМФ.

title: Dear journalists! On behalf of the Armed Forces of Ukraine and...

description: Dear journalists! On behalf of the Armed Forces of Ukraine and myself, I sincerely congratulate you on your professional holiday! In these difficult times, your work is especially important. You work where history is being made to tell the truth about the events at the front and in the rear, about the heroism of Ukrainian soldiers, about the indomitability of our people and the price that Ukraine pays for its freedom and independence. In dangerous conditions you...
description_en: Dear journalists! On behalf of the Armed Forces of Ukraine and myself, I sincerely congratulate you on your professional holiday! In these difficult times, your work is especially important. You work where history is being made to tell the truth about the events at the front and in the rear, about the heroism of Ukrainian soldiers, about the indomitability of our people and the price that Ukraine pays for its freedom and independence. In dangerous conditions you...

Ви працюєте там, де твориться історія, щоб розповісти правду про події на фронті і в тилу, про героїзм українських воїнів, про незламність нашого народу та ціну, яку Україна платить за свою свободу і незалежність. У небезпечних умовах ви...

title: Mariupol: Drone attack on infrastructure
title_en: Mariupol: Drone attack on infrastructure
title_uk: Маріуполь: атака безпілотників на інфраструктуру
description: Oil depot, port set ablaze as Ukraine reportedly launches hundreds of drones towards Russia. Ukrainian drones reportedly struck an oil depot in Russia's Krasnodar Krai as well as port infrastructure in occupied Mariupol overnight on June 6 amid a wider Ukrainian attack on Russian and Russian-occupied regions, Telegram media channels reported.
description_en: Oil depot, port set ablaze as Ukraine reportedly launches hundreds of drones towards Russia. Ukrainian drones reportedly struck an oil depot in Russia's Krasnodar Krai as well as port infrastructure in occupied Mariupol overnight on June 6 amid a wider Ukrainian attack on Russian and Russian-occupied regions, Telegram media channels reported.

title: 🏔 A strange record: a video appeared with a gigantic queue for the...

description: 🏔 A strange record: a video appeared with a gigantic queue for the final assault on Everest, in which 274 people stood at the end of May. At first glance, it looks crazy: a queue at a height of almost 9 kilometers, where every spare moment can cost a life. But the reason is simple — a very short "weather window" when you can climb to the top relatively safely. Climbers have been waiting for weeks for this "window" with...
description_en: 🏔 A strange record: a video appeared with a gigantic queue for the final assault on Everest, in which 274 people stood at the end of May. At first glance, it looks crazy: a queue at a height of almost 9 kilometers, where every spare moment can cost a life. But the reason is simple — a very short "weather window" when you can climb to the top relatively safely. Climbers have been waiting for weeks for this "window" with...
description_uk: 🏔 Странный рекорд: появилось видео с гигантской очередью на финальный штурм Эвереста, в которой в конце мая стояли 274 человека На первый взгляд это выглядит безумием: очередь на высоте почти 9 километров, где каждый лишний час может стоить жизни. Но причина проста — очень короткое «погодное окно, когда на вершину можно подняться относительно безопасно. Альпинисты неделями ждут этого "окна" с...

description: 186 Ukrainians are returning home 👤 Another exchange took place today, during which 185 Defensemen were released from Muscovite captivity by the coordination headquarters for the treatment of prisoners of war. Separately, it was also possible to return to the Motherland one Ukrainian civilian who had been held captive by Muscovites since 2022. 🗒 Among those dismissed today are servicemen of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in particular representatives of...
description_en: 186 Ukrainians are returning home 👤 Another exchange took place today, during which 185 Defensemen were released from Muscovite captivity by the coordination headquarters for the treatment of prisoners of war. Separately, it was also possible to return to the Motherland one Ukrainian civilian who had been held captive by Muscovites since 2022. 🗒 Among those dismissed today are servicemen of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in particular representatives of...
description_uk: Додому повертаються 186 українців 👤 Сьогодні відбувся черговий обмін, в межах якого координаційним штабом з питань поводження з військовополоненими з московитської неволі визволено 185 Оборонців. Окремо також вдалося повернути на Батьківщину одного цивільного українця, якого московити утримували в неволі з 2022 року. 🗒 Серед звільнених сьогодні військовослужбовці ЗСУ, зокрема представники...
